zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Astley於1308年之前出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，他的父親Sir Giles Astley28歲，母親Alice de Wolvey24歲。他於1336年與Elizabeth de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年之後在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾本特利，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Astley于1308年之前出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，他的父亲Sir Giles Astley28岁，母亲Alice de Wolvey24岁。他于1336年与Elizabeth de Beauchamp在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年之后在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾本特利，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Astley was born before 1308, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir Giles Astley, was 28 and his mother, Alice de Wolvey, was 24. He married Elizabeth de Beauchamp in 1336, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1368, in Bentley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Astley est né avant 1308, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles Astley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice de Wolvey, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Beauchamp en 1336, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1368, à Bentley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Astley vor 1308 in Astley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Giles Astley 28 und seine Mutter Alice de Wolvey 24. Er hat 1336 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1368 in Bentley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Astleyが1308年以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Astleyは28歳，母Alice de Wolveyは24歳であった。1336年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでElizabeth de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年以後にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアベントリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Astley(이)가 1308년 이전 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Giles Astley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Wolvey(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Elizabeth de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 벤틀리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Beauchamp em 1336, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Astley родился перед 1308 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Giles Astley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Wolvey, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Beauchamp в 1336 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1368 г. в местности бентли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
